name: bin-alzain
description: Bin Al-Zain Coffee Shop — Arabic e-commerce (React + Express + PostgreSQL)

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "cyan,green" --kill-others-on-fail "PORT=4000 npm run dev --prefix backend" "PORT=3000 BACKEND_PORT=4000 BASE_PATH=/ npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "cyan,green" --kill-others-on-fail "PORT=4000 npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx drizzle-kit push --config drizzle.config.ts
